---
title: "main-functions"
format: html
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
execute:
  collapse: true
  comment: "#>"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(plasticRank)
```

```{r}
#Ranking Function by country
rank_table("co2_per_capita", 2019)
rank_table("population",2020)
```

```{r}
#Creates a quantitative graph like a bubble plot
bubble(x = "co2_per_capita", y = "gdp_per_capita", size = "population", transform = "log", year_select = 2020) 
```

```{r}
#Calculates and tests the correlation between two variables
calc_correlation("co2_per_capita","gdp_per_capita")
calcca_correlation("population","plastic_waste_per_capita")
```
